Explanation: Same product code appears on more than one product row.
Recommended action: Stop import and ask client which SKU is authoritative before using Šifra as the primary key.

Explanation: Same barcode appears on more than one non-empty barcode row.
Recommended action: Keep products separate by Šifra; ask client whether barcode duplication is intentional.

Explanation: Rows where no matching folder exists in Product photos/ after trimming spaces and removing dots from folder names.
Recommended action: Keep product without photos/full DOCX copy until assets are provided.

Explanation: Folders in Product photos/ whose normalized folder name does not match any catalog SKU.
Recommended action: Confirm whether these folders belong to a future catalog batch or should be renamed.

Explanation: Product folders where textutil could not extract DOCX text.
Recommended action: Fix or replace the DOCX file before publishing full product copy.

Explanation: Rows where 'DC (lager)' is empty/null.
Recommended action: Do not expose DC (lager) publicly; ask client if a separate public availability field will be provided.

Check name: Action price higher than regular price
Explanation: Rows where numeric Akcijska MPC is greater than numeric MPC redovna.
Recommended action: Ask client to confirm price data before publishing these SKUs.

Explanation: Rows where numeric Akcijska MPC equals numeric MPC redovna.
Recommended action: Ask client whether these are truly action items or should display as regular-price products.

Explanation: Detected values exactly matching placeholder tokens: 9, 0, /, -, N/A, NA.
Recommended action: Do not display these values publicly unless the client confirms the value is meaningful.

Explanation: Rows where action validity date fields are plain numbers in the exported workbook.
Recommended action: If present, ask whether Excel serial dates should be converted for display; keep source values unchanged.

Explanation: Frequently repeated values found: EVONEK (26), RAF (28), BEAUTECH (10), ORBITA (20), POMPEA MIMI (11), SPARKLE (15)
Recommended action: Confirm these are valid customer-facing filter/spec values before exposing as filters.

Explanation: Frequently repeated values found: crna (37), bela (29), siva (29), plava (17)
Recommended action: Confirm these are valid customer-facing filter/spec values before exposing as filters.
